forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
High

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly in the middle of the day then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning north to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the west in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
No Rating
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending north to northeasterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming northerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then turning northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
No Rating

Cloud clearing. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 40 km/h before turning west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h turning northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Becoming cloudy. High chance of showers west of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning then tending northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon then tending southeasterly in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the far west, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwest to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 27.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
Moderate
Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.
